meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Freelancer SaaS Starter Kit: Beat Basic App Bottlenecks
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Use this SaaS starter kit guide to scale your freelance business with Antigravity and Claude Code for professional-grade output.
content.answer_block: Stop wasting time on boilerplate. A professional SaaS starter kit acts as your architectural foundation, automating authentication, database schemas, and billing logic. By integrating Antigravity for structural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative implementation, you convert hours of manual setup into minutes, allowing you to ship high-value client features faster.
content.intro:
You’re stuck in the 'CRUD trap.' Every client project starts with the same soul-crushing cycle: setting up Auth0, configuring PostgreSQL, and fighting with Tailwind configurations. You’re not building value; you’re building scaffolding. Your competitors are shipping production-ready SaaS platforms while you’re still wiring up database migrations.

The shift happens when you stop coding from scratch and start leveraging an opinionated SaaS starter kit. By treating your codebase as a product rather than a chore, you regain control over your timeline and profit margins. It’s time to move from manual labor to automated architectural dominance.

steps.title: Establish the Architectural Baseline
steps.description: Initialize your project structure using a battle-tested boilerplate to ensure type safety and folder hierarchy are pre-configured.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a Next.js 14+ SaaS project with Drizzle ORM, NextAuth, and Stripe integration. Ensure a clean modular architecture suitable for enterprise-scale client work.

steps.title: Automate Database Schema Synchronization
steps.description: Use AI to map complex business requirements into normalized database schemas without manual migration headaches.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Drizzle schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application including tables for Organizations, Users, Roles, and SubscriptionPlans.

steps.title: Implement Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
steps.description: Secure your application logic by embedding strict permission middleware early in the development lifecycle.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust RBAC middleware that restricts API routes based on user roles (Admin, Member, Viewer) defined in the schema.

steps.title: Accelerate UI Component Injection
steps.description: Rapidly prototype client dashboards using pre-built, accessible component libraries that integrate seamlessly with your backend.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard sidebar and data table component using Shadcn UI, connected to the recently created API endpoints.

steps.title: Stress-Testing and Deployment Readiness
steps.description: Automate the final integration checks to ensure your starter kit is production-ready and fully documented for client handoff.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive README.md and a CI/CD pipeline configuration for Vercel deployment, including environment variable validation.

pro_tips: Always define your business logic in a dedicated 'domain' layer to decouple it from your UI, making future migrations trivial.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your auth middleware first; if your security layer breaks, the rest of the app is irrelevant.
Leverage Antigravity to generate 'mock' seed data early, allowing you to build the UI without waiting for production API availability.
Maintain a 'master' branch of your starter kit that receives updates from your latest client projects, creating a self-improving flywheel.
Prioritize 'feature flags' in your starter kit; it allows you to deploy incomplete features safely while keeping the client satisfied.
content.next_steps: Once your starter kit is deployed, clone it to a private repository and treat it as your proprietary product. Use it as a base for every new client contract to reduce development time by 60%.
content.conversion_block: Stop trading your time for manual setup and start scaling your freelance agency with professional-grade automation. You have the tools, the blueprint, and the expertise to dominate your market. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
